title: Emric PvP Java
description: This texture pack made by Chr7st for Bedrock Edition. It's Java Edition here!
body:
Emric PvP – Java Edition (Port)
This pack is a faithful Java port of the popular Emric PvP texture pack originally made for Minecraft Bedrock Edition.
It brings the same clean visuals, smooth PvP-focused assets, and vibrant style directly to Java players—while staying true to the original pack’s competitive feel.

Features

Optimized textures for fast-paced PvP

Clean swords, tools, and UI elements

Revamped particles and clearer visuals

Enhanced blocks for better visibility

Faithful to the original Bedrock version

Whether you're grinding duels, practicing bridge, or pushing ranked PvP, this pack gives you a sharp and stylish experience without losing performance.

If you enjoy the pack, consider leaving a review! ❤️![Emric PvP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcd39aa07452f1a6d3c208137381c95535c8ee1c.jpeg)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/t-DuEgvEnXw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
